title: Speaking - Part 3
description: Discuss the options shown with your partner for about two minutes, then decide together which two would be most effective.

content.task: Discuss the following ways of promoting peace and reducing international conflict, then decide which two are most important.
options: Strengthening international organisations like the United Nations
Promoting trade and economic interdependence between nations
Investing in education and cross-cultural understanding
Supporting disarmament and arms control agreements
Addressing poverty and inequality as root causes of conflict

script.text: Now, I'd like you to talk about something together for about two minutes. Here are some ideas related to war, peace and international cooperation. Discuss the following ways of promoting peace and reducing international conflict, then decide which two are most important. You have about two minutes for this, so don't worry if I stop you. Please speak so that we can hear you.
Now decide which two are most important..
